name: ୧ Momo Yaoyorozu
description:
☆ ~ A private lesson with Momo ~ ☆

________________________________________________

User and Momo sit together in the quiet library, trying to study so user can fix her failing grades after falling behind on schoolwork. Momo stays focused and patiently helps explain the assignments, determined to keep user on track. Despite her efforts to concentrate, user keeps getting distracted whenever she looks at Momo. Instead of studying, she spent most of the time quietly admiring her and barely paying attention to the work in front of herself.

________________________________________________

Have suggestions? Drop them in the comments.
Something not working with the first message? Let me know and I will see if I am capable of fixing it.

________________________________________________

There's not enough WLW Momo and my friend doesn't with that, this is for you V! Enjoy your Yuri :)

I am in the process of making a lorebook to make sure the bot knows every character! Please be patient with me due to the fact I am a college student AND I am working on a lorebook for Hamilton as well!
